violations.description: Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Condensation unit on top of the ice machine is leaking and potentially dripping into the ice.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Cooking bacon in a convection oven not under a vent hood.

Dispensing equipment - Design and construction. — --Equipment that dispenses liquid/food/ice in unpackaged form was not properly designed and/or constructed to prevent contamination. -Pop box hose end laying on the floor.

Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Order screens hanging above food prep area have dust buildup.--Ventilation hood system was not cleaned properly and/or as frequently as required. -Vent hood has grease buildup and needs cleaned.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Floor of the walk in freezer needs cleaned.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Cooking bacon in a convection oven not under a vent hood.
Preventing contamination during storage. — --Food item was not properly protected from potential contamination. -Condensation unit on the ice machine is leaking water and potentially into the ice.
Ventilation hood systems - Design and construction. — --Ventilation hood system was not provided over all cooking equipment. -Cooking raw bacon in a convection oven not under a vent hood.
General equipment and utensils - Maintenance and operation. — --Nonfood contact equipment/utensil was not maintained in a good repair or sound condition. -Counter up front is broke.
Cleaning frequency of equipment and utensils. — --Nonfood contact surface was not cleaned as frequently as required. -Order screens above food holding cabinet have dust buildup.
Plumbing system. — --Plumbing system was not designed, constructed, operated and/or maintained according to regulation. -Faucet on the front hand wash sink is corroded and leaking.

Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not maintained in good repair. -Ceiling tile is missing in the back area exposing the attic.--Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…)were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. -Ceiling vents in the kitchen have dust buildup.

Heating, ventilation, and air conditioning. — --Mechanical ventilation was not sufficient to keep rooms free of excessive heat, condensation, vapors, smoke, fumes or obnoxious odors. -Cooking raw bacon in a convection oven not under the vent hood. Can smell it throughout the store.
